params.name: sysparm_query
params.description: Encoded query string to filter attachments. Common fields include table_name, table_sys_id, file_name, and content_type.

params.name: sysparm_limit
params.description: Maximum number of attachment records to return.

items.docs: Retrieves metadata for file attachments. Supports query filtering by table name, record sys_id, file name, and other attachment attributes.

params.name: sys_id
params.description: The unique system identifier for the attachment record.

items.docs: Retrieves metadata for a single attachment by its sys_id. Does not return the binary file content; use the file download endpoint instead.

params.name: sys_id
params.description: The unique system identifier for the attachment record.

items.docs: Deletes an attachment and its associated file content from the ServiceNow instance.

params.name: sys_id
params.description: The unique system identifier for the attachment record.

items.docs: Downloads the binary file content of an attachment. The response Content-Type header reflects the original file type.

info.name: Servicenow Upload a File Attachment via Binary Stream

params.name: table_name
params.description: The name of the table to which the file is attached.

params.name: table_sys_id
params.description: The sys_id of the record to which the file is attached.

params.name: file_name
params.description: The name of the file including its extension.

items.docs: Uploads a file as a binary stream and attaches it to the specified table record. The Content-Type header should match the actual file type being uploaded.

info.name: Servicenow Upload a File Attachment via Multipart Form Data

items.docs: Uploads a file using multipart form-data encoding and attaches it to the specified table record. This method is suitable for web browser and form-based uploads.
